case_title: SAFEAMERICA CREDIT UNION VS. AHMAD COTTON

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAFEAMERICA CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COTTON, AHMAD $2,605.91 PRINCIPAL, $2,581.81 INTEREST, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,262.72

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAFEAMERICA CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COTTON, AHMAD $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,655.00, DEFENDANT AHMAD COTTON NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL FROM POST OFFICE SENT TO, DEFT.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR NOTICE OF INTENTION TO ISSUE AMENDED AND CORRECTED JUDGMENT AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

NOTICE ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT AHMAD COTTON, RETURNED "UNDELIVERABLE ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD".

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE, REPORTER RITA HOWELL (206).
